title: Crynoid

'''Crynoids''', or '''snow spiders''', were [[Spider/Legends|arachnids]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Water/Legends|ice]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Neftali/Legends|Neftali]]. Skilled at climbing and jumping, the tiny, three-[[Centimeter/Legends|centimeter]]-long [[Species/Legends|species]] had ten segmented [[Limb/Legends|legs]] and was [[Color/Legends|colored]] gray and white. Preferring to live among certain [[Moss/Legends|mosses]] found in the planet's [[Cave/Legends|caverns]] near [[Temperature/Legends|thermal]] vents, they were known to crawl into an individual's [[Sleeper (furniture)|bedroll]], and during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], a small number were located in [[Exovar's Emporium]].<ref name="WretchedHives" />

While the [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] crynoids mostly ate the mosses they lived among and were not generally aggressive, they would bite if harassed such that they felt threatened. This bite would inject a potent [[Poison/Legends|venom]] that could [[Death/Legends|kill]] a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] within an [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]]. Those individuals that were lucky to survive or had a [[Medpac/Legends|medpac]] handy would not escape or receive relief from the intense pain the venom would bestow for six [[Time/Legends|hours]], for there was no known remedy. The solitary creatures could only be seen in pairs when they had recently [[Reproduction/Legends|mated]].<ref name="WretchedHives" />

==Behind the scenes==
Crynoids were created for in ''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'', a [[1997]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The book was written by [[Paul Danner]] and featured an illustration of the arachnid by [[Jacen Burrows]].<ref name="WretchedHives" />
